title: After the Satsuki Sho: First, We Eat

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser wins the Satsuki Sho in
magnificent fashion and turns her attention to the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Disappointed by their losses, Mihono Bourbon
and Rice Shower both vow to get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the three of them continue onward,
aiming for victory at the Japanese Derby.
